acceptanceCriteria: Tenant list, show, upsert, lifecycle, permission, API, screen, database, and planning records are mapped.
blockers: Missing ownership or route coverage should be raised as Work & Automation issues.
name: Complete tenant registry coverage
richNotes: Track list, show, upsert, lifecycle, permission, API, screen, and table coverage for Tenant.
validationPlan: Run focused tenant and platform registry checks after each coverage update.

acceptanceCriteria: Users has tenant menu route, permissions, APIs, screens, database fields, audit events, tests, and lifecycle behavior documented.
blockers: Confirm service/controller implementation status before marking ready.
name: Users coverage plan
richNotes: Users belongs to the tenant Master Contacts group and must stay on route /tenant/foundation/users with plural kebab-case route and registry keys.
validationPlan: Run tenant Foundation registry checks and focused users API/screen tests when implementation is added.
